message.content:
Fetch this URL and return the full list of math functions documented there, especially any groupings or categories: https://sourceware.org/newlib/libm.html#Math

I need to know which functions are documented as user-callable entry points. Return the function names organized by category if possible.

input.prompt: Extract the complete list of all math functions documented as user-callable entry points. Organize them by their categories or groupings. Include function names and any categorization provided.

content.content:
# Mathematical Functions Documentation - Complete List

## Category 1: Trigonometric Functions
- `sin`, `sinf` — sine
- `cos`, `cosf` — cosine
- `tan`, `tanf` — tangent
- `asin`, `asinf` — arc sine
- `acos`, `acosf` — arc cosine
- `atan`, `atanf` — arc tangent
- `atan2`, `atan2f` — arc tangent of y/x

## Category 2: Hyperbolic Functions
- `sinh`, `sinhf` — hyperbolic sine
- `cosh`, `coshf` — hyperbolic cosine
- `tanh`, `tanhf` — hyperbolic tangent
- `asinh`, `asinhf` — inverse hyperbolic sine
- `acosh`, `acoshf` — inverse hyperbolic cosine
- `atanh`, `atanhf` — inverse hyperbolic tangent

## Category 3: Exponential & Logarithmic Functions
- `exp`, `expf` — exponential (base e)
- `exp2`, `exp2f` — exponential (base 2)
- `exp10`, `exp10f` — exponential (base 10)
- `expm1`, `expm1f` — exponential minus 1
- `log`, `logf` — natural logarithm
- `log10`, `log10f` — base 10 logarithm
- `log2`, `log2f` — base 2 logarithm
- `log1p`, `log1pf` — logarithm of 1 + x
- `pow`, `powf` — x to power y
- `pow10`, `pow10f` — base 10 power

## Category 4: Root & Power Functions
- `sqrt`, `sqrtf` — positive square root
- `cbrt`, `cbrtf` — cube root
- `hypot`, `hypotf` — distance from origin

## Category 5: Rounding Functions
- `floor`, `floorf` — round downward
- `ceil`, `ceilf` — round upward
- `round`, `roundf` — round to nearest
- `trunc`, `truncf` — round toward zero
- `rint`, `rintf` — round to integer
- `nearbyint`, `nearbyintf` — round to integer (no exception)
- `lrint`, `lrintf`, `llrint`, `llrintf` — round to long integer
- `lround`, `lroundf`, `llround`, `llroundf` — round to nearest long

## Category 6: Remainder & Modulo Functions
- `fmod`, `fmodf` — floating-point remainder
- `remainder`, `remainderf` — round and remainder
- `remquo`, `remquof` — remainder and quotient

## Category 7: Floating-Point Manipulation
- `frexp`, `frexpf` — split into mantissa and exponent
- `ldexp`, `ldexpf` — multiply by power of 2
- `modf`, `modff` — split fractional and integer parts
- `scalbn`, `scalbnf`, `scalbln`, `scalblnf` — scale by FLT_RADIX power
- `ilogb`, `ilogbf` — extract exponent
- `logb`, `logbf` — extract exponent (floating-point)
- `nextafter`, `nextafterf` — next representable value
- `copysign`, `copysignf` — copy sign between values

## Category 8: Extremum Functions
- `fmax`, `fmaxf` — maximum value
- `fmin`, `fminf` — minimum value
- `fdim`, `fdimf` — positive difference
- `fma`, `fmaf` — fused multiply-add

## Category 9: Absolute Value
- `fabs`, `fabsf` — absolute value (magnitude)

## Category 10: Special Value Generation
- `infinity`, `infinityf` — IEEE infinity representation
- `nan`, `nanf` — NaN (not-a-number) representation

## Category 11: Classification & Comparison Macros
- `fpclassify` — classify floating-point value
- `isfinite` — test for finite value
- `isinf` — test for infinity
- `isnan` — test for NaN
- `isnormal` — test for normal value
- `isgreater` — greater-than comparison
- `isgreaterequal` — greater-than-or-equal comparison
- `isless` — less-than comparison
- `islessequal` — less-than-or-equal comparison
- `islessgreater` — less-than-or-greater comparison
- `isunordered` — test for unordered relationship
- `signbit` — test for negative sign
- `finite`, `finitef` — archaic finite test
- `isinf`, `isinff` — archaic infinity test
- `isnan`, `isnanf` — archaic NaN test

## Category 12: Error & Special Functions
- `erf`, `erff` — error function
- `erfc`, `erfcf` — complementary error function
- `gamma`, `gammaf` — logarithmic gamma (archaic)
- `lgamma`, `lgammaf` — logarithmic gamma
- `tgamma`, `tgammaf` — true gamma function
- `gamma_r`, `gammaf_r`, `lgamma_r`, `lgammaf_r` — reentrant gamma variants

## Category 13: Bessel Functions
- `j0`, `j0f` — Bessel function of first kind, order 0
- `j1`, `j1f` — Bessel function of first kind, order 1
- `jn`, `jnf` — Bessel function of first kind, order n
- `y0`, `y0f` — Bessel function of second kind, order 0
- `y1`, `y1f` — Bessel function of second kind, order 1
- `yn`, `ynf` — Bessel function of second kind, order n

## Complex Number Functions (complex.h)

### Complex Trigonometric/Hyperbolic
- `csin`, `csinf` — complex sine
- `ccos`, `ccosf` — complex cosine
- `ctan`, `ctanf` — complex tangent
- `csinh`, `csinhf` — complex hyperbolic sine
- `ccosh`, `ccoshf` — complex hyperbolic cosine
- `ctanh`, `ctanhf` — complex hyperbolic tangent

### Complex Inverse Trigonometric/Hyperbolic
- `casin`, `casinf` — complex arc sine
- `cacos`, `cacosf` — complex arc cosine
- `catan`, `catanf` — complex arc tangent
- `casinh`, `casinhf` — complex arc hyperbolic sine
- `cacosh`, `cacoshf` — complex arc hyperbolic cosine
- `catanh`, `catanhf` — complex arc hyperbolic tangent

### Complex Exponential & Logarithmic
- `cexp`, `cexpf` — complex exponential
- `clog`, `clogf` — complex natural logarithm
- `clog10`, `clog10f` — complex base-10 logarithm
- `cpow`, `cpowf` — complex power

### Complex Utility
- `cabs`, `cabsf`, `cabsl` — complex absolute value
- `carg`, `cargf` — complex argument (phase angle)
- `creal`, `crealf`, `creall` — extract real part
- `cimag`, `cimagf`, `cimagl` — extract imaginary part
- `conj`, `conjf` — complex conjugate
- `csqrt`, `csqrtf` — complex square root
- `cproj`, `cprojf` — Riemann sphere projection

## Floating-Point Environment Functions (fenv.h)

- `feclearexcept` — clear exceptions
- `fegetenv` — retrieve environment
- `fegetexceptflag` — get status flags
- `fegetround` — get rounding direction
- `feholdexcept` — save environment
- `feraiseexcept` — raise exceptions
- `fesetenv` — set environment
- `fesetexceptflag` — set status flags
- `fesetround` — set rounding direction
- `fetestexcept` — test exception flags
- `feupdateenv` — update environment

content.text:
Complete list of math functions documented at sourceware.org/newlib/libm.html organized by category:

**Trigonometric**: sin, sinf, cos, cosf, tan, tanf, asin, asinf, acos, acosf, atan, atanf, atan2, atan2f

**Hyperbolic**: sinh, sinhf, cosh, coshf, tanh, tanhf, asinh, asinhf, acosh, acoshf, atanh, atanhf

**Exponential & Logarithmic**: exp, expf, exp2, exp2f, exp10, exp10f, expm1, expm1f, log, logf, log10, log10f, log2, log2f, log1p, log1pf, pow, powf, pow10, pow10f

**Root & Power**: sqrt, sqrtf, cbrt, cbrtf, hypot, hypotf

**Rounding**: floor, floorf, ceil, ceilf, round, roundf, trunc, truncf, rint, rintf, nearbyint, nearbyintf, lrint, lrintf, llrint, llrintf, lround, lroundf, llround, llroundf

**Remainder & Modulo**: fmod, fmodf, remainder, remainderf, remquo, remquof

**Floating-Point Manipulation**: frexp, frexpf, ldexp, ldexpf, modf, modff, scalbn, scalbnf, scalbln, scalblnf, ilogb, ilogbf, logb, logbf, nextafter, nextafterf, copysign, copysignf

**Extremum**: fmax, fmaxf, fmin, fminf, fdim, fdimf, fma, fmaf

**Absolute Value**: fabs, fabsf

**Special Value Generation**: infinity, infinityf, nan, nanf

**Classification & Comparison**: fpclassify, isfinite, isinf, isnan, isnormal, isgreater, isgreaterequal, isless, islessequal, islessgreater, isunordered, signbit, finite, finitef, isinf, isinff, isnan, isnanf

**Error & Special Functions**: erf, erff, erfc, erfcf, gamma, gammaf, lgamma, lgammaf, tgamma, tgammaf, gamma_r, gammaf_r, lgamma_r, lgammaf_r

**Bessel**: j0, j0f, j1, j1f, jn, jnf, y0, y0f, y1, y1f, yn, ynf

**Complex Trigonometric/Hyperbolic**: csin, csinf, ccos, ccosf, ctan, ctanf, csinh, csinhf, ccosh, ccoshf, ctanh, ctanhf, casin, casinf, cacos, cacosf, catan, catanf, casinh, casinhf, cacosh, cacoshf, catanh, catanhf

**Complex Exponential/Logarithmic**: cexp, cexpf, clog, clogf, clog10, clog10f, cpow, cpowf

**Complex Utility**: cabs, cabsf, cabsl, carg, cargf, creal, crealf, creall, cimag, cimagf, cimagl, conj, conjf, csqrt, csqrtf, cproj, cprojf

**Floating-Point Environment**: feclearexcept, fegetenv, fegetexceptflag, fegetround, feholdexcept, feraiseexcept, fesetenv, fesetexceptflag, fesetround, fetestexcept, feupdateenv
